text: Paris is the capital of France and the Seine runs through the city center.
Tokyo is the capital of Japan and is known for dense rail transit and large urban districts.
Cairo is the capital of Egypt and sits on the Nile River in North Africa.
Lima is the capital of Peru and lies near the Pacific coast west of the Andes.
A DHCP reservation keeps one device on the same local IP address by binding the address to its hardware identity.
Guest Wi-Fi isolation lets visitors use the internet without reaching private devices on the main home network.
mDNS allows devices on one local network to discover hostnames and services without a central DNS server.
A router reboot restarts the device while a factory reset erases custom settings and returns the router to defaults.
RWIF keeps semantic memory in compact files on disk so retrieval does not require a separate always-on vector database tier.
A read-only semantic store can answer queries but it must reject write operations and proposal commits.
A federated semantic-memory config combines multiple stores behind one MCP surface while preserving store identity and provenance.
Docker Desktop settings can mount the semantic-memory config read-only while leaving one store root writable for approved mutations.
python -m unittest discover runs Python's built-in test discovery and will search the test tree for matching test modules.
On Linux a virtual environment is commonly activated with source .venv/bin/activate before running project commands.
pyproject.toml declares package metadata, runtime dependencies, and optional dependency groups for Python builds.
JSONL stores one JSON object per line so records can be streamed, appended, and processed incrementally.
A red giant forms after a star exhausts hydrogen in its core and expands into a much larger cooler outer envelope.
Comet tails point away from the Sun because sunlight and the solar wind push dust and gas outward.
A lunar eclipse happens when Earth moves between the Sun and the Moon and Earth's shadow falls across the Moon.
The Great Red Spot is a long-lived storm in Jupiter's atmosphere that has persisted for centuries.
Tomatoes grow best with full sun, warm weather, and steady watering that keeps the soil evenly moist.
Mulch helps soil retain moisture and suppresses weeds by covering the surface around plants.
Rosemary prefers well-drained soil and moderate watering rather than constantly wet roots.
Finished compost adds organic matter to soil and improves structure for roots and soil organisms.
